overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a dark, narrow service corridor with red emergency lighting before emerging into a rain-slicked neon-lit commercial street filled with holographic advertisements, futuristic storefronts, and scattered pedestrians. The atmosphere is dense with fog and cyberpunk aesthetic featuring vivid cyan, magenta, and red neon signage.

events.description: distant figure in corridor turns and exits through side doorway

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously through the dimly lit corridor toward the purple-lit exit

notable_agents.action: standing in the corridor ahead, then turning and exiting through a doorway on the right

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a narrow, dark service corridor illuminated by red emergency lights. The walls are industrial concrete with pipes visible. Debris is scattered on the floor. A distant figure stands ahead near the purple-lit archway exit, then turns and disappears through a side door as the player approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cyberpunk commercial plaza with wet pavement and neon signage

events.description: exits narrow corridor into open neon-lit street with fog and reflective wet pavement

agents.ego_description: walking through the rain-slicked neon street observing the cyberpunk surroundings and signage

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in colorful jacket walking ahead of the player toward the plaza

entered.detail: rain-slicked pavement reflecting the neon lights
large cyan neon sign shaped like lips
cyan neon arrow sign pointing left
tall building facade with various neon signs and advertisements
building facade with glowing windows and neon trim
red glowing paper-style lanterns hanging above the street

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the corridor into a wide-open cyberpunk plaza with wet, reflective pavement. The scene is bathed in cyan and magenta neon light from various signs including a prominent lip-shaped sign. Red lanterns hang above the misty street. A pedestrian in bright clothing walks ahead as the player explores the open area.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial walkway with holographic advertisements and storefront displays

events.description: approaching large holographic advertisement displays and illuminated storefront windows

agents.ego_description: slowing to observe the holographic dancers in the storefront windows while continuing down the street

notable_agents.action: holographic woman standing near the wall with hands on hips
pedestrian standing near the storefront entrance observing the street

entered.detail: illuminated advertisement billboard for DARRA POLYTECHNIC featuring a handgun
large window displaying holographic dancers in pink and blue neon
vibrant graffiti art of a demonic face on the teal wall
various neon signs and illuminated storefront awnings

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a commercial walkway passing the DARRA POLYTECHNIC billboard and large holographic displays showing dancing figures in neon pink. A holographic woman stands near the wall while colorful demon graffiti decorates the building. The street continues ahead with more neon signage visible in the distance as fog drifts through the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into a sprawling, neon-drenched cyberpunk plaza. It begins in a dark service hallway of concrete and pipes illuminated by red emergency lights, where a distant figure vanishes through a side door just as the camera reaches a purple-lit archway. As the player emerges from the tunnel, the environment abruptly opens into a wide plaza of wet, reflective pavement bathed in cyan and magenta light, featuring red lanterns and a prominent lip-shaped neon sign. The scene then shifts toward a commercial walkway, passing the DARRA POLYTECHNIC billboard and large holographic displays of dancing figures in neon pink. Finally, the camera glides past a holographic woman and colorful demon graffiti as fog drifts through the street, revealing a distant horizon of endless neon signage.
